overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a sunlit forest trail. The character travels through dense woodland with wildflowers and stone walls, transitioning from a fenced path to a more structured stone-lined corridor approaching a distant settlement.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding forest path, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the forest floor
weathered wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
clusters of vibrant purple flowers growing on the left bank
tall oak trees with dense green canopy forming a tunnel overhead
thick green shrubs and grass lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sun-dappled dirt trail through a dense summer forest. A wooden fence lines the right side while purple wildflowers bloom on the left bank. The path winds gently uphill through tall oak trees with patches of bright sky visible through the leafy canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with fallen log and stone wall

events.description: passing a large fallen tree trunk lying across the right edge of the path
wooden fence transitions to low stone wall on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward, navigating past the fallen log obstacle

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk blocking part of the right side of the path
low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest as Geralt passes a fallen log on the right. The wooden fence gives way to a stone wall on the left while the trail remains surrounded by dense greenery. The lighting remains dappled as the canopy thickens overhead.

events.description: stone wall appears on the right side, creating a walled corridor effect
distant wooden barricade and settlement structures become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the stone-walled path toward the distant wooden structures

entered.detail: low stone wall matching the left side, creating a defined corridor
wooden cart or barrier visible at the end of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes a defined corridor with stone walls on both sides as Geralt approaches distant wooden structures. The forest opens slightly to reveal more sky, and the path ahead shows signs of civilization with a wooden barricade visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sun-dappled forest trail that gradually transforms from a wild woodland path into a structured stone corridor. It begins with Geralt walking uphill through a dense summer forest, where a wooden fence lines the right side and purple wildflowers bloom along the left bank. As the camera progresses, the wooden fence gives way to a stone wall on the left and the path passes a fallen log while the overhead canopy thickens. The scene then shifts as the trail becomes a defined corridor enclosed by stone walls on both sides, with the surrounding forest opening slightly to reveal more of the sky. Finally, the path leads toward signs of civilization, moving toward a distant wooden barricade and settlement structures.
